hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers board-level risk visibility by consolidating compliance workflows, audit evidence, and regulatory signals into a unified dashboard tailored for digital asset executives.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive risk visibility fades across workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams often lack a unified view of digital asset compliance risk due to fragmented provider outputs and manual data aggregation. This limits their ability to make informed decisions and monitor operational exposures in real time.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, workflows, risk signals and audit evidence into a single dashboard, enabling leadership teams to monitor compliance risk and operational status with clear, real-time visibility.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk dashboard
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates provider checks, applies internal policies, and routes data into cases and evidence to deliver clear risk insights for executive oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives boards a provider-neutral view by connecting compliance workflows, risk data, cases and audit evidence in one scalable operating layer.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a controlled compliance layer that supports audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence support and enterprise-scalable risk management.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide risk visibility for VASP executives
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY structures compliance risks into dashboards
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports executive risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider data into risk views
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected dashboard to monitor compliance risk, audit readiness, and operational visibility across KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY display compliance risk?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider data and internal policies into real-time risk scores, alerts and case summaries tailored for board-level risk oversight and decision-making.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY maintains detailed case histories, decision records and evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory inspections with transparent compliance trails.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting tools into one operational compliance layer without disrupting existing workflows.
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a control layer above providers, structuring their outputs into workflows, cases, evidence and reports without replacing any underlying compliance vendors.
final_title: Bring digital asset risk into one dashboard
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates compliance workflows, audit evidence and regulatory signals for executive risk oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
